description: File-based agile PM — phases are sprints, ceremonies are Claude prompts, this manifest is the source of truth.

increments.name: ceremonies
increments.description: Build the sprint ceremony infrastructure that manages all subsequent phases. Dogfooding: the PM tooling is the first thing built.
increments.themeGoal: Bootstrap the delivery machine itself — ceremonies, ceremonies, ralph loop, quality gates

increments.name: bootstrap
increments.description: VPS provisioning, HA cluster setup, front door security, ingress, MetalLB, secrets bootstrapping, GitHub CI.
increments.themeGoal: Provision VPS/bare-metal cluster and install foundation services (Cilium, cert-manager, Sealed Secrets)

increments.name: foundations
increments.description: Crossplane compositions (PostgreSQL, namespaces, RBAC), OpenBao, network policies, cert-manager CA transition.
increments.themeGoal: Crossplane compositions, OpenBao secrets, network policies, cert-manager CA transition

increments.name: ci-hardening
increments.description: Tech debt sprint. No new work until CI is fully green.
increments.themeGoal: CI hardening — all quality gates green before any feature work proceeds

increments.name: integration
increments.description: Integration tests. Kind-based deployment verification. Cost gate on bootstrap scripts.
increments.themeGoal: Integration tests, kind-based deployment verification, cost gate on bootstrap scripts

increments.name: gitops-engine
increments.description: GitLab (split into sub-stories), Harbor, ArgoCD Image Updater, GitLab Runners.
increments.themeGoal: GitOps engine live: GitLab, Harbor, ArgoCD, Image Updater, Runners

increments.name: autarky
increments.description: Vendor system: VENDORS.yaml, fetch, build recipes (ko/docker), deploy/rollback/backup, pipeline wiring.
increments.themeGoal: Vendor autarky: VENDORS.yaml, fetch, build, deploy, rollback, backup pipeline

increments.name: security
increments.description: Istio mTLS, OPA/Gatekeeper, Trivy Operator, Falco, OWASP ZAP.
increments.themeGoal: Zero-trust security: Istio mTLS, OPA/Gatekeeper, Trivy, Falco, OWASP ZAP

increments.name: observability
increments.description: kube-prometheus-stack, Grafana, Loki, Thanos, Tempo, dashboards, AlertManager.
increments.themeGoal: Full observability: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Thanos, Tempo, alerting

increments.name: devex
increments.description: Backstage, code-server, SonarQube, ReportPortal.
increments.themeGoal: Developer autonomy: Backstage, code-server, SonarQube, ReportPortal

increments.name: testing-and-ha
increments.description: Selenium Grid, k6, MailHog, Chaos Mesh, HA pass across all charts, GitLab CI vendor builds.
increments.themeGoal: Production hardening: Selenium Grid, k6, MailHog, Chaos Mesh, HA validation

increments.name: sovereign-pm
increments.description: Sovereign PM web app (Node.js/React) — replaces this file-based PM system. Self-hosting the sprint tooling.
increments.themeGoal: Sovereign PM web app — replace this file-based PM with a self-hosted product

increments.name: sovereign-pm-webapp
increments.description: Build the Sovereign PM web application (Node.js/Express backend, React frontend, Helm chart). Replaces the file-based PM system with a self-hosted product. The documentation layer (story 035) is done; this increment delivers the running app.
increments.themeGoal: T3 Developer Autonomy — sovereign-pm web app (E14): backend API, React UI, Dockerfile, and Helm chart deployed into kind

increments.name: remediation
increments.description: Remediation sprint — restores broken GGEs and resolves priority-0 blockers.
increments.themeGoal: Restore platform health: fix broken GGEs and unblock delivery.

increments.name: developer-portal
increments.description: Backstage developer portal and code-server (VS Code in browser). Provides service catalog, developer self-service, and the primary interface for Claude Code agents.
increments.themeGoal: T3 Developer Autonomy — Backstage (E11) and code-server: service catalog, developer portal, browser-based IDE

increments.name: remediation
increments.description: Remediation sprint — restores broken GGEs and resolves priority-0 blockers.
increments.themeGoal: Restore platform health: fix broken GGEs and unblock delivery.

increments.name: developer-portal-argocd
increments.description: Deliver story 027a (ArgoCD Application for Backstage developer portal) and remaining E11/E12 backlog items. Continues the developer portal increment interrupted by increment 12.
increments.themeGoal: T3 Developer Autonomy — complete E11 (Backstage ArgoCD app) and E12 code quality stories

increments.name: remediation
increments.description: Remediation sprint — restores broken GGEs and resolves priority-0 blockers.
increments.themeGoal: Restore platform health: fix broken GGEs and unblock delivery.

increments.name: code-quality
increments.description: Code quality integration: GitLab CI pipeline wiring for SonarQube and ReportPortal. Completes E12 epic.
increments.themeGoal: T3 Developer Autonomy — E12 code quality: GitLab CI integration for SonarQube and ReportPortal

increments.name: restructure
increments.description: Monorepo restructure: contract/, cluster/kind/, platform/. Establishes clean separation between cluster provider and platform. Archives all non-kind providers. First increment of the new architecture.
increments.themeGoal: T1 Sovereignty — establish contract-driven architecture: cluster/kind/, platform/, contract/v1/

increments.name: remediation
increments.description: Remediation sprint — restores broken GGEs and resolves priority-0 blockers.
increments.themeGoal: Restore platform health: fix broken GGEs and unblock delivery.

increments.name: remediation
increments.description: Remediation sprint — restores broken GGEs and resolves priority-0 blockers.
increments.themeGoal: Restore platform health: fix broken GGEs and unblock delivery.

increments.name: kind-integration
increments.description: Kind cluster integration: kind bootstrap script delivers a running sovereign-test cluster with Cilium CNI, cert-manager, sealed-secrets, and autarky egress policy verified.
increments.themeGoal: T1 Sovereignty — kind cluster bootstrap (KIND-001): running cluster with autarky invariants verified end-to-end

increments.name: platform-foundations
increments.description: Platform foundations: deploy core sovereign Helm charts (Cilium, cert-manager, sealed-secrets, OpenBao) into kind cluster. Follows KIND-001 kind bootstrap.
increments.themeGoal: T1 Sovereignty — platform foundations: deploy core charts into kind cluster

increments.name: remediation
increments.description: Remediation sprint — restores broken GGE-G5 and resolves priority-0 blockers.
increments.themeGoal: Restore platform health: GGE-G5 green, plan ceremony self-primes, contract layer foundation.
